calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Mar-26-2024 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-04-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Janet Espy appeared via zoom for Steven Woo (executor).

The Court denies Counsels request to distribute estate assets directly to the trust beneficiary. Petition for final distribution on waiver of account is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wong. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated November 2, 2007 is admitted to probate. Steven Michael Woo is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for March 26, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed, no appearance is required. Shirley Yawitz is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: G. Tan. Not reported.
